mapper.sql: id, task_user_key, gmt_create, gmt_modified, gmt_end, assignee_id, assignee_name, assignee_dept_id, assignee_dept_name, assignee_org_id, assignee_org_name, assignee_mobile, task_id, procinst_id, `status`, flags, task_desc, `comment`, pid, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, biz_id, user_task_id, app_key, proc_form_url, user_task_level, task_title, task_type, proc_form_url_app
mapper.insert: insert into t_wf_hi_ru_task_user (task_user_key, gmt_create, gmt_modified, gmt_end, assignee_id, assignee_name, assignee_dept_id, assignee_dept_name, assignee_org_id, assignee_org_name, assignee_mobile, task_id, procinst_id, `status`, flags, task_desc, `comment`, pid, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, biz_id, user_task_id, app_key, proc_form_url, user_task_level, task_title, task_type, proc_form_url_app) values (#{userTaskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{gmtEnd,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{assigneeMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{taskDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comment,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{pid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{procFormUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userTaskLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{procFormUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update t_wf_hi_ru_task_user set task_user_key = #{userTaskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, gmt_create = #{gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_modified = #{gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, gmt_end = #{gmtEnd,jdbcType=BIGINT}, assignee_id = #{assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_name = #{assigneeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_dept_id = #{assigneeDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_dept_name = #{assigneeDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_org_id = #{assigneeOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_org_name = #{assigneeOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, assignee_mobile = #{assigneeMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, task_id = #{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, procinst_id = #{procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, `status` = #{status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, flags = #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, task_desc = #{taskDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, `comment` = #{comment,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, pid = #{pid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, proc_form_data_key = #{procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_form_key = #{procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, biz_id = #{bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_task_id = #{userTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, app_key = #{appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, proc_form_url = #{procFormUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, user_task_level = #{userTaskLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, task_title = #{taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, task_type = #{taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, proc_form_url_app = #{procFormUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_wf_hi_ru_task_user (task_user_key, gmt_create, gmt_modified, gmt_end, assignee_id, assignee_name, assignee_dept_id, assignee_dept_name, assignee_org_id, assignee_org_name, assignee_mobile, task_id, procinst_id, `status`, flags, task_desc, `comment`, pid, proc_form_data_key, proc_form_key, biz_id, user_task_id, app_key, proc_form_url, user_task_level, task_title, task_type, proc_form_url_app) values
(#{item.userTaskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.gmtCreate,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtModified,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.gmtEnd,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeDeptId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeOrgName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.assigneeMobile,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.status,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.flags,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.taskDesc,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.comment,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.pid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.procFormDataKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procFormKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.bizId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.appKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.procFormUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.userTaskLevel,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.taskTitle,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.taskType,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.procFormUrlApp,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.select:
select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where assignee_id = #{assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and flags & #{flags,jdbcType=INTEGER} != 0

select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where assignee_id=#{assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by gmt_create desc

select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where task_id=#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and (flags & 1 =0) order by id asc

select
from `t_wf_hi_ru_task_user` where `user_task_id`=#{userTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1
select `task_id` from `t_wf_hi_ru_task_user` where `user_task_id`=#{userTaskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1

select
from `t_wf_hi_ru_task_user` where task_id=#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and
status & #{item,jdbcType=INTEGER} !=0

select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where procinst_id=#{procinstId,jdbcType=BIGINT} and assignee_id=#{assigneeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and assignee_org_id=#{assigneeOrgId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1

select assignee_dept_id, assignee_org_id, task_user_key, assignee_id from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where task_id in
#{taskId,jdbcType=BIGINT}
and ( (flags & 4 = 0 and (flags & 64 = 64 or flags & 1024 = 1024)) or (flags & 4 = 4 and flags & 1024 = 1024) )
and flags & 16 = 0 and flags & 32 = 0
select user_task_id from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where task_user_key=#{userTaskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1

select
from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where task_user_key=#{userTaskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1

select user_task_id as id, assignee_id, pid, flags from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where task_id in
#{item,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select procinst_id from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where task_user_key=#{userTaskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
select task_id from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where task_user_key=#{userTaskKey,jdbcType=VARCHAR} limit 1
select task_id from t_wf_hi_ru_task_user where id=#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT} limit 1
